sources.name: scc_parcels
sources.description: Santa Clara County parcels (Socrata ubcd-cewv), GeoJSON with geometry

sources.name: san_jose_permits
sources.description: San Jose Building Permits (data.sanjoseca.gov) — local file sj-permits.csv

constraints: Assessor owner names, assessed/market/land values, year built, livable area, and last sale date/price are a PAID offline bulk order from the Santa Clara County Assessor — left 100% NULL in v1 (honest gap).

Permits cover the City of San Jose only. Sunnyvale, Santa Clara city, Mountain View, Palo Alto and other city permit portals offer no bulk export and are not yet ingested — has_permits is a San-Jose-only signal in v1.
has_bbb_contractor is derived from a non-empty CONTRACTOR-on-record in the San Jose permit (a real contractor signal), NOT the national BBB harvest.
has_sunbiz_tenant is NULL: CA SOS bizfile bulk business data is a paid order; the FL Sunbiz stage has no free CA equivalent.
lot_area_sqft/total_area use shape_area_stateplane (verified real sqft via UTM reprojection); the raw `shape_area` field is NOT square feet.
latitude/longitude are parcel MultiPolygon centroids (no point field exists).
